basic_info.insurer_name: HDFC ERGO General Insurance Company Limited

standard_variant.room_rent_limit: Not explicitly specified - reasonable and customary charges apply
standard_variant.icu_coverage: Covered - includes ICU bed, general medical support services, monitoring devices, critical care nursing and intensivist charges

coverage_features.coverage_details: Hospital room rent/boarding, Nursing, ICU, Medical Practitioners fees, Anesthesia, Blood, Oxygen, Operation theatre, Surgical appliances, Medicines, drugs & consumables, Diagnostic procedures
coverage_features.notes: Hospitalization must be medically necessary as per evidence-based medicine guidelines

coverage_features.coverage_details: Consultations, investigations and medicines incurred before hospitalization
Consultations, investigations and medicines incurred after discharge
Medical treatment or surgical procedure under general or local anaesthesia requiring admission < 24 hours
coverage_features.notes: Treatment normally taken on out-patient basis not included

coverage_features.coverage_details: Treatment at home when patient cannot be moved to hospital or room not available. Includes pre-hosp 60 days and post-hosp 90 days
coverage_features.notes: Coverage only if treatment period greater than 3 days

coverage_features.coverage_details: Medical and surgical expenses of organ donor for harvesting where insured is recipient
coverage_features.notes: Must comply with Transplantation of Human Organs Act 1994. Donor pre and post-hosp expenses not covered. Expenses by insured while donating NOT covered
Healthcare/ambulance service provider must be registered with road traffic authority

coverage_features.coverage_details: Inpatient care under Ayurveda, Unani, Siddha, Homeopathy, Yoga & Naturopathy at AYUSH Hospital
coverage_features.notes: Treatment outside India not covered. Treatment at non-hospital facility not covered

coverage_features.coverage_details: Payable if hospitalized in shared accommodation at network hospital for each completed 24 hours if hospitalization exceeds 48 hours

coverage_features.feature_name: Daily Cash for Shared Accommodation - Exclusive (SI Rs.3-5L)
Daily Cash for Shared Accommodation - Exclusive (SI Rs.7.5-15L)
Daily Cash for Shared Accommodation - Exclusive (SI Rs.20-50L)
Daily Cash for Accompanying Insured Child - Exclusive (SI Rs.3-5L)
coverage_features.coverage_details: For 1 accompanying adult if insured child aged 12 years or less hospitalized for > 72 hours
coverage_features.notes: Date of admission and discharge not counted

coverage_features.feature_name: Daily Cash for Accompanying Insured Child - Exclusive (SI Rs.7.5-15L)
Daily Cash for Accompanying Insured Child - Exclusive (SI Rs.20-50L)

coverage_features.coverage_limit: Additional benefit on payment of additional premium
coverage_features.coverage_details: Medically necessary treatment while newborn hospitalized. Proposal form must be submitted within 90 days after birth
coverage_features.notes: Coverage incepts from date premium received. Applicable only if Maternity benefit opted and claim admitted

coverage_features.coverage_details: Payable if insured hospitalized as inpatient beyond 10 consecutive continuous days
coverage_features.notes: Payable only once per illness/accident per policy year

coverage_features.coverage_limit: Rs.2.5 lakhs per hospitalization, upto basic sum insured limit for year
coverage_features.coverage_details: Airplane or helicopter transportation for emergency life threatening conditions requiring immediate rapid transport that ground transport cannot provide
coverage_features.notes: Treatment required in India only, not overseas. Air ambulance must be registered in India. Return transportation excluded. Available for SI Rs.3L and above

conditions: Limited to 2 deliveries or terminations during lifetime
Pre and post-hospitalization expenses not covered under maternity
Ectopic pregnancy covered under inpatient treatment, not maternity benefit
Claims only for insured person's spouse, not other dependents

critical_illnesses_covered: First Heart Attack of specified severity
critical_illness_optional.sum_insured: 50% or 100% of In-patient Sum Insured, minimum Rs.1 lakh, maximum Rs.10 lakhs
critical_illness_optional.waiting_period: 90 days from policy commencement (if not previously insured continuously)
critical_illness_optional.maximum_claims: 3 claims under policy or any Easy Health policy
critical_illness_optional.conditions: Always provided on individual SI basis irrespective of individual or floater policy

exclusions.description: Expenses for treatment of any illness within 30 days from first policy commencement
exclusions.exception_conditions: Does not apply for accidents or if insured has continuous coverage for more than 12 months. Applies to enhanced sum insured

exclusions.exclusion_name: Specified Disease/Procedure Waiting Period - Code Excl02
exclusions.description: 24 months continuous coverage required for listed conditions/surgeries/treatments
exclusions.exception_conditions: Does not apply for claims due to accident or if underlying cause is cancer. Waiting period reduced by prior coverage under portability/migration. Longer waiting period applies if also under PED waiting. Applies even if contracted after policy

exclusions.description: 36 months continuous coverage required for treatment of pre-existing disease and direct complications
exclusions.exception_conditions: Waiting period reduced by prior coverage under portability/migration. Coverage after 36 months subject to declaration and acceptance. In case of SI enhancement, exclusion applies afresh to enhanced amount

exclusions.description: Treatment arising from insured committing or attempting breach of law with criminal intent

exclusions.exclusion_name: Hazardous or Adventure Sports - Code Excl09
exclusions.description: Treatment necessitated due to participation as professional in hazardous or adventure sports (para-jumping, rock climbing, mountaineering, rafting, motor racing, horse racing, scuba diving, hand gliding, sky diving, deep-sea diving)

exclusions.exclusion_name: Alcoholism, Drug or Substance Abuse - Code Excl12
exclusions.description: Treatment for alcoholism, drug or substance abuse or any addictive condition and consequences
Surgical treatment of obesity unless specific conditions met
exclusions.exception_conditions: Covered if: upon doctor's advice, supported by clinical protocols, member 18+ years, BMI ≥40 or ≥35 with severe co-morbidities (obesity-related cardiomyopathy, coronary heart disease, severe sleep apnea, uncontrolled Type2 Diabetes) after failure of less invasive methods

exclusions.description: Treatment for correction of eye sight due to refractive error less than 7.5 dioptres

exclusions.exclusion_name: Cosmetic or Plastic Surgery - Code Excl08
exclusions.description: Expenses for cosmetic or plastic surgery or treatment to change appearance
exclusions.exception_conditions: Covered if for reconstruction following Accident, Burns or Cancer, or as part of medically necessary treatment to remove direct and immediate health risk (must be certified by attending Medical Practitioner)

exclusions.description: Any treatment including surgical management to change characteristics of body to opposite sex
Any unproven treatment, services and supplies lacking significant medical documentation to support effectiveness
Admission primarily for diagnostics and evaluation purposes only. Diagnostic expenses not related or incidental to current diagnosis and treatment

exclusions.exclusion_name: Rest Cure, Rehabilitation and Respite Care - Code Excl05
exclusions.description: Admission primarily for enforced bed rest, custodial care, and services for terminally ill

exclusions.exclusion_name: Health Hydros, Nature Cure Clinics, Spas - Code Excl13
exclusions.description: Treatments in health hydros, nature cure clinics, spas or similar establishments or private beds attached to such establishments or admission for domestic reasons
Dietary supplements and substances purchasable without prescription, including vitamins, minerals and organic substances
exclusions.exception_conditions: Covered if prescribed by medical practitioner as part of hospitalization claim or day care procedure

exclusions.description: Medical treatment expenses traceable to childbirth (including complicated deliveries and caesarean sections), miscarriage and lawful medical termination of pregnancy
exclusions.exception_conditions: Ectopic pregnancy covered. Covered to extent provided under Section B.1.3.a) if maternity benefit opted

exclusions.description: Any type of contraception, sterilization, assisted reproduction services (IVF, ZIFT, GIFT, ICSI), gestational surrogacy, reversal of sterilization
Treatment in hospitals or by providers specifically excluded by insurer and disclosed on website/notified to policyholders
exclusions.exception_conditions: In life threatening situations or following accident, expenses up to stabilization stage payable but not complete claim

exclusions.description: Treatment arising from war, invasion, act of foreign enemy, civil war, public defence, rebellion, revolution, insurrection, military or usurped acts, nuclear weapons/materials, chemical and biological weapons, radiation
Intentional self injury or attempted suicide while sane or insane
Participation or involvement in naval, military or air force operation
Prosthetic and other devices which are self-detachable/removable without surgery involving anaesthesia
Treatment availed outside India
Treatment at healthcare facility that is not a Hospital
Circumcisions
exclusions.exception_conditions: Covered if necessitated by illness or injury and forming part of treatment

exclusions.description: Any non-allopathic treatment
exclusions.exception_conditions: Covered to extent of AYUSH benefit

exclusions.description: Conditions for which treatment could have been done on outpatient basis without hospitalization
Preventive care, vaccination including inoculation and immunizations
exclusions.exception_conditions: Covered in case of post-bite treatment

exclusions.description: Provision or fitting of hearing aids, spectacles or contact lenses including optometric therapy, treatment for alopecia, baldness, wigs, toupees, medical supplies including elastic stockings, diabetic test strips
Sleep apnoea
Congenital external diseases, defects or anomalies
Expenses incurred by insured on organ donation

Treatment and supplies for analysis and adjustments of spinal subluxation, diagnosis and treatment by manipulation of skeletal structure, muscle stimulation except treatment of fractures (excluding hairline fractures) and dislocations of mandible and extremities
Dental treatment and surgery of any kind
Any non-medical expenses mentioned in List 1 of Annexure I
Treatment rendered by Medical Practitioner outside his discipline or the discipline for which he is licensed
Treatments rendered by Medical Practitioner who is member of insured's family or stays with him
exclusions.exception_conditions: Proven material costs eligible for reimbursement

exclusions.description: Any treatment or part of treatment that is not of reasonable charge and not medically necessary
Drugs or treatments which are not supported by prescription
Any specific time bound or lifetime exclusion(s) applied and specified in Schedule
Admission for administration of Intra-articular or Intra-lesional injections, Supplementary medications like Zolendronic acid or IV immunoglobulin infusion

waiting_periods.reduction_conditions: Does not apply for accidents or if insured has continuous coverage for more than 12 months
Reduced to extent of prior coverage under portability/migration. Coverage after 36 months subject to declaration and acceptance
Does not apply for claims due to accident or if underlying cause is cancer. Reduced to extent of prior coverage under portability/migration

waiting_periods.disease_or_procedure: Maternity Expenses - Exclusive Variant (Individual SI Rs.3-7.5L)
Maternity Expenses - Exclusive Variant (Individual SI Rs.10-50L)
Maternity Expenses - Exclusive Variant (Family Floater SI Rs.3-15L)
Maternity Expenses - Exclusive Variant (Family Floater SI Rs.20-50L)

waiting_periods.reduction_conditions: Does not apply if previously insured continuously and without interruption under Easy Health Policy

procedures: Surgery for prolapsed inter vertebral disk

illnesses: Calculus diseases of gall bladder including Cholecystitis
Fissure/fistula in anus, hemorrhoids, pilonidal sinus
Ulcer and erosion of stomach and duodenum
All forms of cirrhosis (alcohol-related cirrhosis excluded)
Calculus diseases of Urogenital system (Kidney stone, Urinary bladder stone)

procedures: Surgery of varicose veins and varicose ulcers

illnesses: Internal tumours, cysts, nodules, polyps, skin tumours

sub_limits.description: Rs.2,000 per hospitalization
Rs.2.5 lakhs per hospitalization, up to basic sum insured limit for year

sub_limits.item_name: Daily Cash for Shared Accommodation - Standard
sub_limits.description: Rs.500 per day, maximum Rs.3,000

sub_limits.item_name: Daily Cash for Shared Accommodation - Exclusive (SI Rs.3-5L)
sub_limits.description: Rs.500 per day, maximum Rs.3,000

sub_limits.item_name: Daily Cash for Shared Accommodation - Exclusive (SI Rs.7.5-15L)
sub_limits.description: Rs.800 per day, maximum Rs.4,800

sub_limits.item_name: Daily Cash for Shared Accommodation - Exclusive (SI Rs.20-50L)
sub_limits.description: Rs.1,000 per day, maximum Rs.6,000

sub_limits.item_name: Daily Cash for Accompanying Child - Exclusive (SI Rs.3-5L)
sub_limits.description: Rs.300 per day, maximum Rs.9,000

sub_limits.item_name: Daily Cash for Accompanying Child - Exclusive (SI Rs.7.5-15L)
sub_limits.description: Rs.500 per day, maximum Rs.15,000

sub_limits.item_name: Daily Cash for Accompanying Child - Exclusive (SI Rs.20-50L)
sub_limits.description: Rs.800 per day, maximum Rs.24,000
Rs.10,000 lump sum if hospitalized beyond 10 consecutive days. Once per illness/accident per policy year
Rs.15,000 including pre/post natal Rs.1,500 and newborn Rs.2,000
Rs.25,000 including pre/post natal Rs.1,500 and newborn Rs.2,000
Rs.25,000 including pre/post natal Rs.2,500 and newborn Rs.3,500
Rs.40,000 including pre/post natal Rs.2,500 and newborn Rs.3,500
Rs.30,000 including pre/post natal Rs.5,000 and newborn Rs.5,000
Rs.50,000 including pre/post natal Rs.5,000 and newborn Rs.5,000
50% or 100% of In-patient Sum Insured, minimum Rs.1 lakh, maximum Rs.10 lakhs
1% of SI per insured person up to Rs.5,000, once at end of every continuous 4 claim free years
1% of SI subject to max Rs.5,000 per insured person, once at end of every continuous 3 policy years
1% of SI per policy up to Rs.5,000, once at end of every continuous 4 claim free years
1% of SI per policy subject to max Rs.5,000, once at end of every continuous 3 policy years
Rs.5,000 lump sum if insured accepts and utilizes alternate network provider suggested by company for surgical or medical treatment

cumulative_bonus.accrual_rate: 10% of Base Sum Insured per policy year
cumulative_bonus.notes: Irrespective of any claims. Applied post completion of each policy year. In family floater, available at policy level for all insured persons
cumulative_bonus.portability_migration: Offered to extent of sum of previous SI and accrued cumulative bonus. Does not apply to additional increased SI

stay_active_discount.mechanism: Based on average step count achieved on mobile app

step_targets.5001_to_8000: 2% discount (1 year policy) or 2% (2 year policy)
step_targets.8001_to_10000: 5% discount (1 year policy) or 5% (2 year policy)
step_targets.above_10000: 8% discount (1 year policy) or 8% (2 year policy)

stay_active_discount.conditions: Mobile app must be downloaded within 30 days of policy risk start date. For individual policy, calculated per adult member. For floater, average of all adult members. Dependent children not considered

standard_variant.individual: 1% of SI per insured person up to Rs.5,000, once at end of every continuous 4 claim free years
standard_variant.family: 1% of SI per policy up to Rs.5,000, once at end of every continuous 4 claim free years. If any member makes claim, benefit not offered to whole family

exclusive_variant.individual: 1% of SI subject to max Rs.5,000 per insured person, once at end of every continuous 3 policy years
exclusive_variant.family: 1% of SI per policy subject to max Rs.5,000, once at end of every continuous 3 policy years

preventive_health_checkup.definition: Package of medical tests for general health assessment, not diagnostic or investigative tests for illness

moratorium_period.description: After 60 continuous months of coverage (including portability and migration), no policy/claim contestable except on grounds of established fraud
moratorium_period.applicable_to: Sums insured of first policy. For enhanced SI, 60 months from enhancement date on enhanced limits only

cashless.network_hospitals: Network hospitals listed on website or in welcome kit
cashless.planned_treatment_notice: At least 48 hours before planned treatment or hospitalization
cashless.emergency_notice: Within 24 hours after treatment or hospitalization
documents_required: Notice that insured wishes to use cashless service

claim_intimation_time.planned_hospitalization: At least 48 hours prior to admission
claim_intimation_time.emergency_hospitalization: Within 24 hours of start of hospitalization

reimbursement.document_submission_time: Within 15 days of earlier of company's request or insured's discharge from hospitalization or completion of treatment
documents_required: Claim form duly completed and signed
Original bills (pharmacy, consultation, diagnostic with attachments)
All reports and records (medical reports, case histories, indoor case papers, investigation reports, treatment papers, discharge summaries)
Detailed list of medical services and treatments with unit prices
Prescriptions naming insured person with drugs prescribed, price and receipt
Pre and post investigation, treatment and follow-up records for present ailment
Investigation, treatment and follow-up records for past ailments since first diagnosis
Treating doctor's certificate regarding missing information
Copy of settlement letter from other insurance company or TPA
Stickers and invoice of implants used
Copy of MLC records and FIR for accident claims
NEFT and KYC requirements (ID/Address proof and photograph)

claim_settlement_time.standard_time: 15 days from date of receipt of intimation
claim_settlement_time.penal_interest: 2% above Bank Rate from date of receipt of intimation to date of payment if delayed

grace_period.coverage_during_grace: Yes, if premium paid in instalments during policy period

free_look_period.applicable_to: New individual health insurance policies only, not renewals or portability/migration
free_look_period.refund_conditions: Refund of premium less medical examination expenses and stamp duty charges; or proportionate risk premium if risk commenced; or proportionate premium if part coverage commenced

renewal.conditions: Cannot be denied based on claims in preceding years (except benefit-based policies). Delay condoned up to grace period. No loading based on individual claims experience. No fresh underwriting unless SI increased

portability.notice_period: At least 30 days before, not earlier than 60 days from renewal date
portability.continuity_benefits: Accrued waiting period benefits as per IRDAI guidelines

migration.notice_period: At least 30 days before renewal date
migration.continuity_benefits: Accrued continuity benefits in waiting periods as per IRDAI guidelines

cancellation.by_policyholder: 7 days written notice. Pro-rata premium refund for unexpired period. No refund if claim admitted or benefit availed. For instalment premium policies: future instalments adjusted in claim amount, no refund during policy year
cancellation.by_insurer: 15 days written notice on grounds of established fraud or non-disclosure or misrepresentation. No premium refund
cancellation.death_of_insured: Proportionate premium refund for unexpired period IF no claims for that insured person

policy_conditions.territorial_limit: All medical treatment must be taken within India. All payments in Indian Rupees within India

premium_payment.instalment_conditions: In event of claim, all subsequent premium instalments immediately become due and payable. Company can recover pending instalments from claim amount. No interest charged if instalment not paid on due date. Policy cancelled if instalment not paid within grace period

auto_debit_ecs.requirements: ECS Mandate form completely filled and signed. Premium amount and frequency must be specified. New form required for any change in premium. Company must be informed 15 days prior if discontinuing ECS. Non-payment subject to 15 days relaxation period leads to termination

multi_year_discount.two_year_policy: 7.5% if paying 2-year premium in advance as single premium

floater_discount.family_floater: 55% on all members except oldest member

risk_loading.counter_offer_response_time: 7 days to accept and pay additional premium

geography.tier_2_cities: Rest of India - All other cities
geography.midterm_address_change: Premium modified on pro-rata basis if migration from one zone to another

consequences: Policy cancelled ab initio from inception/renewal date
Policy may be modified at company's discretion with 15 days notice
options_for_ped_non_disclosure: Permanently exclude disease/condition and continue policy
Additional waiting period up to 3 years from detection date
Levy underwriting loading from first year or renewal

company_contact.level_1_address: D-301, 3rd Floor, Eastern Business District (Magnet Mall), LBS Marg, Bhandup (West), Mumbai - 400078

list_1_items_not_covered: Blood grouping and cross matching of donors samples
Service charges where nursing charge also charged
Nimbus bed or water or air bed charges
Private nurses charges - special nursing charges
Any kit with no details mentioned
subsumed_in_room_charges: Expenses related to prescription on discharge
subsumed_in_treatment_costs: Blood reservation charges and ante natal booking charges
Nutrition planning charges - Dietician charges - Diet charges

unique_benefits: Stay Active Discount (up to 8% based on step count)
Healthcare Advisory Benefit (Rs.5,000 if accepting alternate network provider)
Evidence-based medicine criteria for hospitalization necessity
Daily cash for accompanying child (Exclusive variant)
Recovery benefit for hospitalization >10 days (Exclusive variant)
Newborn baby coverage (Exclusive variant, additional premium)
Critical illness optional benefit (up to Rs.10 lakhs)
special_conditions: Specified disease waiting period does not apply if underlying cause is cancer
Domiciliary treatment requires minimum 3 days (coverage only if >3 days)
Maternity limited to 2 deliveries/terminations in lifetime
Critical illness maximum 3 claims under any Easy Health policy
Health checkup - Standard variant requires claim-free years, Exclusive variant does not
Stay Active discount - dependent children not considered for step calculation
Penal interest on delayed claim settlement: 2% above Bank Rate
